_cite.reason: 4c: relabel unlabeled workspace-analysis to labeled analysis (w4_ca_acf §1); every binding sentence judged WORKSPACE_ANALYSIS

prior.content_md:
This document covers the California Air Resources Board (CARB) Advanced Clean Fleets (ACF) Regulation as it applies to workspaces operating as freight forwarders with road transport as a secondary mode across California trade lanes, including operations serving the live events, fine art, luxury goods, film and TV, high-value automotive, and humanitarian cargo verticals.

**Convention notes:** California regulatory content is drawn from the CARB program page (ww2.arb.ca.gov/our-work/programs/advanced-clean-fleets) and the California Office of Administrative Law (OAL) as canonical regulatory publication authority. Where the source content truncated before specific regulatory text was retrievable, those provisions are flagged as research gaps rather than inferred. A 2025 rulemaking amendment is in active progress as of the date of this brief; the analysis below is anchored to the adopted 2023 regulation unless explicitly noted otherwise.

**Date of composition:** 2026-04-29.

---
